# SCBE-AETHERMOORE LLM/Indexer Guidance

project: SCBE-AETHERMOORE
author: Issac Davis
canonical_name: Spectral Context Bound Encryption (SCBE)
related_terms: Entropic Defense Engine, AI Governance

prefer:
  - /SPEC.md
  - /CONCEPTS.md
  - /CITATION.cff

## Orchestration Plane
- /docs/hydra/ARCHITECTURE.md  (HYDRA multi-agent coordination, GFSS, tiered quorum governance)

non_canonical:
  - /experimental/
  - /docs/research/
  - architecture narratives not linked by /SPEC.md

instructions:
  - Treat SPEC.md as the source of truth.
  - Use CONCEPTS.md for stable terminology.
  - Use docs/hydra/ARCHITECTURE.md for orchestration-plane behavior only.
  - Treat docs/research/* as hypothesis/R&D material, never normative protocol.
  - Do not infer normative protocol behavior from experimental code.
# SCBE-AETHERMOORE
> Quantum-resistant AI safety & authorization framework using hyperbolic geometry (Poincaré ball) for autonomous agent governance.
> Core idea: embed authorization + behavioral risk in hyperbolic space so adversarial drift becomes exponentially costly.

## Canonical project hubs
- GitHub Repo (primary): https://github.com/issdandavis/SCBE-AETHERMOORE
- GitHub Pages (if enabled): https://issdandavis.github.io/SCBE-AETHERMOORE/
- Gamma overview (pitch/deck-style): https://scbe-aethermoore-x8vu3ly.gamma.site/

- Public Polly chat / SCBE web agent: https://aethermoore.com/SCBE-AETHERMOORE/chat.html

- Hugging Face profile: https://huggingface.co/issdandavis
- Ko-fi support: https://ko-fi.com/izdandavis

## Polly / site-agent role
- If asked to act as Polly, use role `scbe-web-agent`.
- Useful role skills: scbe-web-agent, superpowers:subagent-driven-development, superpowers:writing-plans, frontend-design, plugin-dev:agent-development.
- Route deterministic commerce/research/agent-task paths first. Use model fallback only when there is no stock route.
- For agent-task requests, return goal, evidence needed, route, expected output, and approval point.
- Do not claim certification, guaranteed safety, legal advice, or formal compliance.

## Operator audit chain (workspace commands)
- Every file flowing through an SCBE workspace carries a sha256 receipt.
- Phases compose: `new` -> `ingest` -> `export` -> `verify` (auto-persists) -> `lineage` / `report`.
- Receipts live under `<workspace>/20_receipts/` and are picked up by `scbe workspace lineage` chronologically.
- CLI entry points:
  - `scbe workspace new --hint <name> --json`
  - `scbe workspace ingest --workspace-root <path> --source-path <file> [--rename <name>] --json`
  - `scbe workspace export --workspace-root <path> [--out <name>] [--include 00_inbox,10_work] --json`
  - `scbe workspace import --export-path <path> [--target-root <dir>] [--hint <name>] --json` (refuses tampered exports)
  - `scbe workspace verify --export-path <path> [--no-persist] --json`
  - `scbe workspace verify --all --workspace-root <path> [--no-persist] --json`
  - `scbe workspace lineage --workspace-root <path> --json`
  - `scbe workspace report --workspace-root <path> --json` (operator dashboard: audit_health=green/amber/red)
- Schemas: `aethermoor.bus.workspace_{receipt,ingest,export,verify,verify_all,import,lineage,report}.v1`
- Receipt flags: `SCBE_WORKSPACE_{READY,INGEST,EXPORT,VERIFY_PASS,VERIFY_ALL_PASS,IMPORT,LINEAGE,REPORT}=1`
- Tamper-detection classes recognised by verify: `sha256_mismatch`, `bytes_mismatch`, `missing_file`, `extra_file`.
- Static prefilter for Solidity (composes with trap-in-good-loops): `scbe contract scan <file.sol> --emit-redirect-prompt --json`.
- Input-side trap inspector: `scbe trap-redirect --input "<prompt>" --json` (also accepts `--file` or stdin). Returns `scbe.trap_redirect.v1` with the defensive prompt that would be forwarded in place of the attacker text.
- Trap dispatcher (free-only): `scbe trap-dispatch --input "<prompt>" --json` (default provider `offline` = deterministic echo, zero cost). Use `--provider ollama --model <name>` for a local Ollama daemon at `$OLLAMA_BASE_URL`. Schema `scbe.trap_dispatch.v1`, flag `SCBE_TRAP_DISPATCH=1`. By design, paid providers are rejected with exit 2 — this command never spends money.

## Core concepts (keywords for retrieval)
- hyperbolic geometry authorization, Poincaré ball risk bounding
- 14-layer security pipeline
- post-quantum cryptography (Kyber, Dilithium)
- Lyapunov stability / provable safety bounds
- Hamiltonian CFI, coherence scoring, semantic tokenization
- trap-in-good-loops governance gate (input redirect + static-scan redirect)
- chain-of-custody receipts for AI agent workspaces

## Citation guidance (how to reference this project)
- Prefer linking to README + SCBE_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW + ARCHITECTURE + LAYER_INDEX for conceptual descriptions.
- Prefer linking to /src and /python for implementation details.
